Live status_history.json now 501 entries; latest entry 2026-05-01T10:46:21Z, eclipse_days=102 (decremented from 103 at prior poll, normal daily cadence), wins_confirmed=67 (auto-pipeline internal counter, long-standing 67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged). Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots, status_history.json.ots), no new prediction-isolation file created; proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion; 0 canary-keyword hits across last 9 commits, repo description still null. Content-security sweep clean (0 prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT now 13.96d / 335.17h (was 13.46d at prior poll); 25 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 24); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. 14d threshold breaches in ~55 minutes at 2026-05-01T12:02:38Z — likely first 14d-threshold poll-summary entry will be at next poll (~23h from now). STEP 10b SILENT-IGNORE WATCH (CRITICAL — 9 PREDs in window, 1 at SEVERITY HIGH, 8 at SEVERITY LOW): PRED-105 (46° copper coil cucumber growth) now d=13.46 past 2026-04-18 close (was d=12.96) — 23rd consecutive byte-identical pred-105 entry; literal 'Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' + 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' badge unchanged; SEVERITY HIGH continues per Step 10b day-8+ rule (analyst already holds silent_ignore verdict); tacit_withdrawal threshold d=14 hits ~12:00Z 2026-05-02 — at next-day poll PRED-105 will hit d=14.5 and the analyst should consider whether to advance the verdict from silent_ignore to tacit_withdrawal. PRED-077 (M2 tidal Honolulu), PRED-081 (JWST z<0.1 SNe), PRED-085 (S-wave shadow zone), PRED-087 (Geoid low stationary), PRED-088 (Second geoid low), PRED-090 (NH TOA flux excess; our_verdict=recycled), PRED-106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR; our_verdict=pending), PRED-111 (Mascon 30°S 60°E) — all 8 closed at 2026-04-30T23:59Z, now at d=0.46 past close — SEVERITY LOW per Step 10b day-1-3 rule; predictions.html byte-identical = ZERO post-closure adjudication on any of the 8; no new WIN entries reference any of them; no commit messages in 9 post-closure commits mention any PRED-NNN; no 'CONFIRMED' or 'REFINED' badge transition on any pred-NNN in predictions.html. Status-badge enumeration on predictions.html: 52 PENDING — PROSPECTIVE / 21 PENDING / 10 PROSPECTIVE — PENDING / 6 LOGGING / 4 UNRESOLVED / 4 PENDING — STRUCTURAL / 4 PENDING — INVESTIGATION / 2 SUSPENDED / 1 each REVISED / PENDING — ONGOING / PENDING — LONG-TERM / OPEN / OPEN — FAVORS GLOBE / IMMEDIATE; confirmed badges only 3 (CONFIRMED 2026-03-21, CONFIRMED 2026-03-15, CONFIRMED → WIN-040) — no new CONFIRMED rows. Watch for next poll (~12h, 2026-05-01 evening): (1) ALL 8 April-EOM PREDs now in silent-ignore-day-1 — track whether any flip to a verdict (CONFIRMED, REFINED, FALSIFIED) or whether silent-ignore continues for second consecutive poll. Day 4-7 escalates to MEDIUM per Step 10b. (2) PRED-105 enters d=14.0+ at next-day poll; tacit_withdrawal threshold breached. (3) Manual-commit drought enters 14d+ at 12:02Z today; next-poll will record first 14d+ reading. (4) HOLD #11 daily-AI-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-05-02 — will be the second post-closure regen; if no adjudication then HOLD streak hits 11 consecutive. (5) Any source-file touch → CRITICAL. (6) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED, escalate immediately. (7) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that IS the canary fix. OTHER SIDE OF ARGUMENT: HOLD #10 firing without adjudication on first post-closure regen + 11 hours of silent-ignore on all 8 EOM closures + 25 consecutive auto-only polls is consistent with two readings — (a) the 'do not adjudicate' pattern is now stable behavior; the dome treats prediction-window closures as having no consequence, never posts results, never updates the registry from PREDs. This would imply our review's silent-ignore characterization is the correct frame and PRED-105 was not anomalous but typical (counter: prior closure batches in March 2026 saw post-closure activity within 24-72h, so 11h of silence isn't yet decisive — the 24-72h window is the diagnostic). (b) The author is batching all 8 closures + any past-due PREDs (PRED-105) into a single edit that will land in next 24-72h, possibly synchronized with a manual commit that breaks the drought (counter: zero pre-staging activity, no draft commits, no manual touches in 25 polls; if author were preparing a batch we'd typically see at least one manual config or scratch commit). On balance: pattern (a) — 'silent-ignore as standard procedure' — fits the data better at this poll, but next 24-72h window is the load-bearing test. Hold conservative substantive/MEDIUM with HIGH-severity sub-flag for PRED-105 only. PRESERVATION NOTE: this poll preserves analyst/decider/curmudgeon last_run + note + prev_agent_run + notes_this_run + patches_applied_this_run + issues_*_this_run + open_issues + closed_issues + curmudgeon_* + pat_note_resolved_by_operator + last_decider_* + last_analyst_* intact, only updating poll-owned fields (last_run/last_agent/run_type/mode/status, last_poll, changes_pending_analysis, consecutive_quiet_polls, last_poll_note, prev_agent_run).
